rationale: Gov't Code §2306.111 governs allocation of federal housing funds and low income housing tax credits. It does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount, so raising the exemption creates no conflict.
quote: The department, through the housing finance division, shall administer all federal housing funds provided to the state under the Cranston-Gonzalez National Affordable Housing Act (42 U.S.C. Section 12704 et seq.) or any other affordable housing program.
_note: No textual or operational nexus between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this housing fund allocation statute.
